content: shadcn/ui with Vite 6 + Tailwind CSS v4: (1) scaffold with npm create vite@latest ui -- --template react-ts; (2) install tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite; (3) add @import 'tailwindcss' to index.css; (4) configure vite.config.ts with @tailwindcss/vite plugin and path alias @/*->./src/*; (5) update tsconfig.json and tsconfig.app.json with baseUrl and paths; (6) install @types/node for Node path resolve; (7) run npx shadcn@latest init (picks new-york style, slate color, CSS vars yes, Tailwind v4 auto-detected). shadcn init no longer prompts for tailwind config file - it's CSS-only in v4. Components install: npx shadcn add table badge tabs select button separator skeleton. Gotcha: tailwindcss-animate deprecated in favor of tw-animate-css.
